case.title: FOOD FAIR STORES v. ZONING BOARD OF APPEALS

opinion.h1: FOOD FAIR STORES v. ZONING BOARD OF APPEALS, 373 U.S. 541 (1963)
opinion.h4: FOOD FAIR STORES, INC., ET AL. v. ZONING BOARD OF APPEALS OF CITY OF POMPANO BEACH, FLORIDA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 973. Decided May 27, 1963.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: MILE ROAD CORP. v. CITY OF BOSTON, 373 U.S. 541 (1963)
opinion.p: 373 U.S. 541 MILE ROAD CORP. v. CITY OF BOSTON. APPEAL FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS, SUFFOLK COUNTY. No. 981. Decided May 27, 1963.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Edward M. Dangel and Leo E. Sherry for appellant.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
